emails.subject: Kobra
emails.body: Danielle, Could you please tell whoever was coming to give me the Kobra lesson at 1:30 that I need to move it to 2:30? Thanks, Fletch

emails.subject: RE: Kobra
emails.body: RE: Kobra sure, I will take care of it. To: Marcinkowski, Danielle

emails.subject: RE: Kobra
emails.body: If it's not too late, I don't even need a lesson at all...I'm using my discount broker live feeds. thanks, fletch To: Sturm, Fletcher J.

emails.subject: RE: Kobra
emails.body: Julie Pechersky is walking him over you can let them know when they get there. Do you want me to take you out of Kobra all together so you do not get charged for the application?? thank, -d To: Marcinkowski, Danielle
